# Sift for Card Testing

![pettern](data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20viewBox='0%200%20684%20460'%3E%3C/svg%3E)

Card testing, or carding, is when fraud actors use stolen credit card details for small transactions, verifying which cards are active or have stored value. Verified cards can then be used to make high-dollar fraudulent purchases—or exposed and sold on the dark web. Ultimately, businesses suffer the financial impact of fraud-driven chargebacks, lost revenue, and unauthorized transaction fees.

Download our card testing primer to:

*   Learn more about what card testing is, and how fraudsters use it to drain your revenue
*   Gain a high-level understanding of how Sift addresses card testing fraud
*   See how Sift customers use our AI-powered decisioning models and automation tools to mitigate card testing

### Explore Sift for Card Testing

Download
